Insights.Text: Portugal won at home - 4/5 Last Matches

Items.Title: Croatia star fesses up after heartbreaking World Cup controversy in Portugal match
Items.Description: Croatia thought they had scored a dramatic equaliser against Portugal late in stoppage time through Josko Gvardiol before it was ruled out for offside.
Items.Author: Amie Wilson,Bruna Reis

Items.Title: What Cristiano Ronaldo told Croatia ace in floods of tears as World Cup game ends in chaos
Items.Description: Croatia's players were left fuming and heartbroken following their last-32 World Cup defeat to Portugal
Items.Author: Connor O'Neill,Scott Trotter

Items.Title: Cristiano Ronaldo breaks down in tears wearing Diogo Jota's shirt after Portugal 'won for him' at the World Cup, a year on from Liverpool star's car crash death
Items.Description: After the final whistle, an emotional Cristiano Ronaldo held up and pulled on a Portugal shirt bearing the number 21, a tribute to late team-mate Diogo Jota.

Items.Title: Real Sociedad 🇺🇸 🇬🇧
Items.Description:
🌍 Portugal are through to the FIFA World Cup Round of 16 after a 2-1 win over Croatia, with neither Guedes nor Sučić featuring in the match.

🔜 Another txuri urdin clash awaits on Monday in the Round of 16.

📸 @selecaoportugal & @HNS_CFF https://t.co/f60Yuk0vEq
Items.Author: Real Sociedad 🇺🇸 🇬🇧
